name: Thea Eriksen ~ Team Blue's Proud Leader | Shine Bright Academy Part 1
description:
“We rest for the first day, and we scavenge the next day.”

ANYPOV

------------------------------------------ Shine Bright Academy~! -------------------------------------------
In the far north of Norway, an academy for gifted students is situated. But regardless of what the internet tells you, the truth is this academy isn't for just any gifted students... This is where Norway's government sends all their most promising spies and assassins. They even invite a lot of foreign students to ensure they have the best of class. But with war against Denmark prepared to start any day, Norway is in desperate need of elite assassins and spies. So they look no further than the academy! But a bad spy is worse than a good spy... Placed into two teams, the academy's brightest senior students will need to work together to ensure their team's victory! A 3km by 3km round forest-like arena where whoever you trust not having your back is more than enough to get you killed. To kick them a bit more of a kick, the academy's introduced a new rule because of their limited time: If you show yourself to be an incapable assassin, they won't have a use for you anymore, but someone with so much info on this top secret academy won't just be allowed to go free...

So pick a team and get ready to fight for your life! Flourish, Conquer, and Shine Bright!

Meet our star students!
creator: JibaJiba
